codeReview.summary: Implementation fully satisfies the feature requirements. The DriftDetector compares actual vs planned files, flags excessive drift (>30% threshold), and reports drift percentage. All 20 unit tests pass.

summary: PASS - Feature orch-drift-detector implemented correctly in drift_detector.rs with 576 lines. DriftDetector struct accepts estimated_files and actual_files, calculates drift_percentage as (actual - estimated) / estimated * 100, and sets exceeds_threshold when abs(drift_percentage) > 30.0. DriftReport includes extra_files (beyond plan) and missing_files (not implemented). detect_drift_with_steps provides per-step breakdown. Comprehensive tests cover scope creep, under-implementation, edge cases (empty inputs, duplicates), and threshold boundaries. Public exports properly added to lib.rs.
